privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Carteron Industries, we highly value the protection of your personal data and privacy.
privacy.section1_text:
We only collect the information strictly necessary for the site's operation and to handle your requests via our contact form (name, email address, message, etc.).
No data is shared with third parties without your consent.
privacy.section2_text:
Our site does not use cookies for tracking, advertising, or analytics purposes.
Only technical cookies essential for the site's proper functioning may be used.
privacy.section3_text:
The information you send via the contact form is only used to respond to your inquiries.
It is not sold or used for commercial purposes.
privacy.section4_text: We implement all necessary measures to ensure the security of your data.
privacy.section5_text: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at: ali.ahmed.benhamouda@gmail.com
privacy.section6_text: This privacy policy may be updated at any time. We encourage you to check it regularly.

privacy_banner: We do not collect any personal data for commercial or advertising purposes. Your privacy is respected.

founder_modal.desktop_tagline: Bridging automotive engineering excellence with family-centered golf innovation
founder_modal.vision_text: Making golf more accessible and enjoyable for families through innovative technology that combines performance with practicality.
background_items: Expert in electric & hybrid vehicle optimization
founder_modal.today_text: Combining passion for engineering, golf, and family life to create the revolutionary 2-in-1 electric golf stroller that transforms how parents experience the game.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.meta_description: Terms and conditions for using Carteron Industries services and products.
terms.acceptance_text: By accessing and using Carteron Industries' website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.services_text: Our services are provided for informational and commercial purposes. You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.services_item1: You must not use our services for any unlawful purpose
terms.services_item2: You must not attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
terms.services_item3: You must not interfere with the proper functioning of our services
terms.products_text: All product descriptions, prices, and availability are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order.
terms.intellectual_text: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Carteron Industries and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.
terms.liability_text: Carteron Industries shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of our services.
terms.privacy_text: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs your use of our services.
terms.modifications_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website.
terms.contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

carousel.side_title: An Innovation Serving Golf and Family
carousel.hero_line2: Maximize every tee time on your course.
carousel.side_desc: Offer your members the world's first motorized hybrid golf trolley & stroller — an innovation designed to sustainably retain a new generation of golfers.
carousel.about_intro: Carteron Industries represents a modern vision of mobility. Founded on systems engineering expertise, the company develops intelligent solutions for the agricultural world and outdoor leisure. We believe in useful, sustainable technology adapted to field realities.

innovation.name: Rethought mobility
innovation.desc: A new way to move around the course, designed to combine technology, ease of use and freedom of movement.

startup.name: Golf & family life
startup.desc: A concept designed to allow parents to enjoy golf while keeping their child close to them, in a more peaceful setting.

work.name: Useful innovation
work.desc: Every design choice aims for a concrete goal: simplify the experience, reduce effort and improve everyday use.

tech.name: Safety at the heart of design
tech.desc: Stability, support and braking assistance are integrated into a confidence and peace of mind-oriented approach.

terrain.name: Designed for the course
terrain.desc: Uphill, downhill, movement and equipment management: the product adapts to the realities of the terrain.

card1.title: Agricultural System Engineering
card1.desc: We support agricultural manufacturers and equipment suppliers in the design, development, and optimization of their technical systems. Our approach relies on systems engineering, functional analysis, and field expertise to ensure robust, sustainable, and profitable solutions.

card2.title: Web & Mobile Apps for Agricultural Weighing
card2.desc: Our digital solution allows logging and managing weighing operations via intuitive interfaces connected to tractors with front loaders. Optimize your logistics, save time, and enjoy full traceability.

card3.title: Motorized Golf Trolleys
card3.desc: Designed for passionate golfers, our motorized trolleys combine comfort, range, and ergonomics. With quiet motors and intuitive controls, they transform the playing experience on the course.

card4.title: 2-in-1 Stroller & Golf Trolley Hybrid (Premium Version)
card4.desc: This hybrid trolley brings together the practicality of a golf cart and the comfort of a stroller. Still in development, it is created to let parents enjoy golf while keeping their child close — balancing sport and family without compromise.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our hybrid motorized golf trolley-stroller.

faq1.q: What exactly does CARTERON Industries offer?
faq1.a: We are developing a hybrid motorized golf trolley-stroller — an innovative solution that safely carries your golf clubs, accessories, and a baby seat, all in one convenient piece of equipment.

faq2.q: Why combine a golf trolley and a stroller?
faq2.a:
Because parents shouldn’t have to choose between family time and their favorite sport.
 Our solution lets you play golf while keeping your child close, safely and effortlessly.

faq4.q: What are the benefits for users?
faq4.a:
- Comfort: no more juggling a heavy golf bag and stroller.
- Health: reduces fatigue and strain.
- Family: enjoy more quality time on the course.
- Convenience: folds easily and lasts a full round.

faq5.q: Is it safe for the baby?
faq5.a:
Yes. Safety is our top priority:
• Baby seat compliant with childcare standards.
• Stable design with effective braking.

testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: See what our clients are saying about our innovative solutions for modern agriculture. Their satisfaction is our greatest reward.

t1.name: Pierre Dubois
t1.title: Farmer, Dubois Farm
t1.text: Carteron Industries revolutionized our workflow. Their tech solutions increased our productivity by 40% while reducing our costs.

t2.name: Marie Laurent
t2.title: Director, Agricultural Cooperative
t2.text: The Carteron Industries team is outstanding. Their technical expertise and personalized support transformed our operation. Highly recommended!

t3.name: Jean-Claude Moreau
t3.title: Owner, Moreau Estate
t3.text: After 30 years of traditional farming, I discovered Carteron Industries. Their innovations helped modernize my farm while preserving our traditions.

t4.name: Sophie Martin
t4.title: Agricultural Engineer, Agricultural Institute
t4.text: As an industry expert, I can say Carteron Industries is at the forefront of agricultural innovation. Their solutions are effective and sustainable.

steps.title: Innovation, Step by Step
steps.description: Discover how Carteron Industries is reinventing golf with a motorized 2-in-1 hybrid golf stroller, designed for parents passionate about the sport. Currently in development, this solution is made for parents who want to enjoy golf without giving up precious family time. Our approach encourages golf clubs to adopt new solutions that attract a wider range of players, support parents, and make the sport accessible to every generation.

step1.title: Idea & Market Research
step1.desc: Identifying a real need among golfing families.

step2.title: Concept Design & Development
step2.desc: Defining key features and creating initial mockups.

step4.title: Field Testing with Partner Clubs
step4.desc: Practical evaluations in real course conditions.

step5.title: Safety Certification & Compliance
step5.desc: Validation against childcare and sports equipment standards.

step6.title: Pre-launch Phase
step6.desc: Presentations to golf clubs and pilot families.

contact10.heading1: What if we could play golf... as a family?
contact10.heading1_prefix: What if we could play golf...
contact10.content1: Discover how golf can become more family-friendly, more accessible and more profitable — choose your profile and share your interest in just a few moments.
contact10.golf_club_text: You can help us by becoming a pilot golf club and accompany us in testing our prototype in a real golf course environment.
contact10.golf_family_text: Become our pilot golfing family, accompany us in discovering the product and share your feelings by testing our 2-in-1 golf cart stroller.
contact10.location2Description: Send us an email for any questions or proposals.

our_product.coming_soon_text: We are currently working on our new innovative product. Check back soon to discover all the features and benefits we are preparing for you.
our_product.feature1: Ergonomic and lightweight design for easy use
our_product.feature2: Long-lasting battery for a full day of use
our_product.feature3: Durable materials resistant to weather conditions
our_product.feature4: Quick folding system for easy storage

construction.title: Website Under Construction
construction.subtitle: We are working hard to bring you something amazing!
construction.description: Our team is currently developing this page. Please check back soon for updates!

notre_entreprise.page_subtitle: Innovation, passion and expertise serving family golf
notre_entreprise.story_body: Carteron Industries was born from a simple observation: too many golfer parents have to choose between their sport and time spent with family. We decided to create a solution that reconciles these two worlds — without compromise.
notre_entreprise.cta_text: We are looking for partners and clubs to co-build and test this innovation. Join the adventure!
notre_entreprise.vision_text: Reinvent the golf experience so golfer parents can share their passion with their children, and clubs can attract a new family audience.
notre_entreprise.ambition_text: Bring together sport, technology, and family life in a single solution.
notre_entreprise.mission_text: Ensure a reliable, innovative, user-centric approach, thanks to our technical expertise and passion for golf.
notre_entreprise.value_innovation_text: Pushing boundaries to create unique and useful solutions
notre_entreprise.value_passion_text: Love of golf and family at the heart of every decision
notre_entreprise.value_collaboration_text: Co-building with clubs and families for a tailored product
notre_entreprise.value_quality_text: Technical excellence and safety without compromise

golf_trolley_hybrid.title: BTPG
golf_trolley_hybrid.description: A revolutionary innovation that perfectly combines the functions of a high-end stroller and a motorized golf trolley. Designed for active parents who don't want to choose between their passion for golf and time spent with their children.

motorized_golf_trolley.title: BTPG NAV
motorized_golf_trolley.description: Designed for demanding golfers, our electric trolleys combine performance, autonomy and ergonomics. Developed with silent motorization and intuitive navigation, they enhance the experience on the green.

card1.title: A new golf experience
card1.desc: Rethinking mobility on the course through a smoother, more modern solution better suited to today's needs.

card2.title: Between technology and real use
card2.desc: The project relies on engineering to address concrete needs, with a user-centered approach.

card3.title: Designed for families
card3.desc: A vision that seeks to bring together sporting practice, travel comfort and the child's presence in a single product.

card4.title: Intelligent assistance
card4.desc: Driving and braking assistance provides greater control, especially on demanding terrain.

feature1.title: Electric Assistance
feature1.desc: Powerful motor handles hills and braking. Navigate 18 holes effortlessly with your child alongside you.

feature2.title: Golf-Terrain Adapted
feature2.desc: All-terrain wheels and suspension designed specifically for fairways, roughs, and cart paths.

feature3.title: Ergonomic Design
feature3.desc: Adjustable handlebar, low center of gravity, and balanced weight distribution for maximum stability.

feature4.title: Child Safety First
feature4.desc: 5-point harness, UV canopy, shock-absorbing frame. Meets the highest child safety standards in Europe.

product_detail.cta_description: Contact us to be informed as soon as this revolutionary product becomes available. Be among the first to discover the future of family mobility on the golf course.

business_impact.description: Competitive advantage, offer your members a shared family moment.

benefit1.title: Unlock a New Customer Segment
benefit1.description: Young parents (25–45) represent a massive untapped market. Give them a reason to choose your club.

benefit2.title: Increase Course Utilization
benefit2.description: Parents who couldn't play now book tee times. Fill off-peak slots and boost overall rounds played.

benefit3.title: Premium Positioning
benefit3.description: Be the first club in your region to offer family-friendly innovation. Earn media coverage and word-of-mouth.

benefit4.title: Improve Retention & Revenue
benefit4.description: Members who can bring their children stay longer. Reduce churn and increase lifetime membership value.

kpi.label: The segment that redefines your club

image.caption: An experience designed for modern families.

revolution.label: The challenge
revolution.intro: Today, how do you welcome your members with young children, whether at the driving range or on the course?

block1.text: in attendance or even a cessation of golf practice is observed by golf clubs linked to the arrival of a baby or a second child

block2.text: The average golfer age continues to rise. Clubs struggle to recruit under-40 members, threatening long-term sustainability.

block3.text: Most clubs offer the same experience. There's no innovation to stand out or win new demographics.

block4.text: Parents with young children can't find childcare solutions that let them play. They cancel memberships or never join.

revolution.conclusion: Technology meets family. Innovation meets comfort. Golf meets parenthood.
